name: Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Coat two cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
Combine the shredded apples, apple juice, granulated sugar, and cranberries in a bowl; set aside.
In another bowl, beat the egg, brown sugar, vanilla extract, and oil with an electric mixer until smooth.
Add the apple mixture and stir into the batter by hand.
Add the flours, cereal, baking powder, baking soda, and pie spice; stir into the batter by hand.
Let the batter sit for about 5 minutes to absorb all of the liquid.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto the cookie sheets.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly browned. Cool on wire racks. Repeat with remaining batter.
